summary: TDD step 0 complete. 11 tests authored (R1–R4); 10 RED on current code, 375 existing tests unbroken. Awaiting implementation.

findings.claim: min={1} — HTML min attribute is 1, not 5; no max attribute; snap-to-1 on empty; no onBlur handler; label has no unit indicator; no range hint
findings.evidence: getAttribute('min')='1' (expected '5'); getAttribute('max')=null (expected '480'); label.textContent='Duration' (no 'min'); container text has no '5...480'; no onBlur handler so blur clamp tests produce 0 spy calls
findings.fix: Implementation: local string state + onBlur clamp to [5,480] + min={5} max={480} attrs + 'Duration (min)' label + '5–480' range hint element
